name: HamzaOS
one_liner: Hamza's personal operating system — persona, strategy, calendar, research, content as a unified knowledge + workflow substrate.
notes: Onboarded 2026-05-19. Personal OS with numbered folders (00-persona, 01-strategy, 02-calendar, 03-research, 04-content). Internal-use, not currently a product to sell. Treat as durable input source for this factory's brain (`brain/persona.md` may want to draw from here).
